title: UAE rain commute: When does your travel time count as paid work hours in the emirates?
summary_full: Heavy rains in the UAE are prompting questions about whether delayed commutes count as working hours. While generally not considered work time, exceptions exist in the emirates during officially declared unstable weather, with company transport delays or if explicitly stated in your contract. Understanding these nuances is crucial for employee rights.
